_comment: Static (manifest-independent) sections of pipeline.json. These parts are NOT derived from any tool.manifest.json — they are spread verbatim into the generated config/pipeline.json by scripts/manifests/pipeline-projection.ts. Edit here; the generated pipeline.json is a build artifact (gitignored).

routing._comment: Pipeline order + the ONLY payload fields each stage receives (strict routing — forward nothing else). delivery = merged git+ops.
routing.correction_loop: Revie REJECTED → forward findings + original script_code to Auto only (skip resending Analyst/TCD). Max 2 rounds.
routing.parallel: tcd + datagen run concurrently after analyst; auto waits for both.

id_conventions._comment: Stable IDs so specs/reports/commits cross-reference. 3-digit zero-padded, sequential per session.
id_conventions.TC: Test Case — TC-<DOMAIN>-<nnn> when domain obvious, else TC-001

test_case_vocab._comment: Controlled vocabulary for the test-case xlsx deliverable — the SINGLE source read by the content gate (.kiro/scripts/test-case-lint.py) and documented in steering test-case-docs.md + brain LESS-014/051/053. Edit here; the gate falls back to these same values if this section is absent.
